'''DroidMarts''' were a chain of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] service and retail stores operated by the droid manufacturer [[Rim Securities/Legends|Rim Securities]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], stores were found throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]'s [[Quence sector/Legends|Quence]], [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel]], and [[Portmoak sector/Legends|Portmoak sectors]]. DroidMarts operated on any [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in these [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] with a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] rated [[Stellar-class starport|stellar-class]] or above. The stores made up the bulk of Rim Securities' sales of [[Security droid/Legends|security]], [[Bodyguard droid/Legends|defense]], and [[Explorer droid/Legends|exploration]] droids.<ref name="CFT" />

==Behind the scenes==
DroidMarts were mentioned in ''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'', a sourcebook written by [[Drew Campbell]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].<ref name="CFT" />
